title: bupleurum rigidum subsp. rigidum
intro: Bupleurum rigidum subsp. rigidum is a subspecies of the Bupleurum rigidum plant, also known as the rigid hare's ear or Chinese thorowax, which is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and terpenes. The health benefits of Bupleurum rigidum subsp. rigidum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Bupleurum rigidum subsp. rigidum is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
